title: Gonk Christmas Tree Decorations Felt, 10 Pcs Personalised Christmas Decorations - Natural Straw Santa Claus Ornaments, Suitable for use as Hanging Ornaments or Gift Tags
features: Cute Christmas Shapes: Our charming straw elves feature 5 delightful expressions and colorful knitted hats (red/green/white/pink/gray). Each 3.5-4" elf is handcrafted with love.

Superior and Distinctive: The christmas decorations made from soft knitted yarn, felt fabric, smooth surface and delicate ribbons (red/white) and natural straw, these lightweight ornaments offer a rustic yet cozy texture.

Festive Holiday Essential: Christmas gnome hanging ornaments on trees, mantles, wreaths, or use as package toppers. Perfect for creating warm Christmas atmosphere, bringing cheerful holiday vibes to your home decor.
Easy to Store & Reuse: The mini gonk's simple, compact shape allows for effortless storage in any Christmas decoration box, preventing tangles and saving valuable space for the next festive season.

Eco-Friendly & Durable: The naughty elf constructed with reinforced stitching and quality materials, these elves withstand multiple seasons of use. Sustainable design reduces waste while maintaining vibrant colors and shape over time.
